notes.sg-heart-failure-of-heart-failure: This is a duplicate of the parent topic and too generic.
notes.sg-heart-failure-heart-failure-with: This is a duplicate of the parent topic and too generic.
notes.sg-heart-failure-respiratory-failure: This is a distinct topic from heart failure and should be invalidated.
notes.sg-heart-failure-natriuretic-peptide: This is a biomarker related to heart failure, keep.
notes.sg-heart-failure-arrhythmogenic-right-ve: This is a specific type of cardiomyopathy that can lead to heart failure, keep.
notes.sg-heart-failure-cardiac-resynchronizati: This is a specific treatment for heart failure, keep.
notes.sg-heart-failure-central-sleep-apnea: Central sleep apnea is a comorbidity and risk factor for heart failure, keep.
notes.sg-heart-failure-volume-overload: Volume overload is a cause of heart failure, keep.
notes.sg-heart-failure-diastolic-heart-failure: This is a specific type of heart failure, keep.
